channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Lawsuit says US illegally shared confidential information on Iranian asylum seekers with Iran
item.description: A lawsuit alleges that President Donald Trump’s immigration agencies have shared confidential information about Iranian asylum seekers with the Iranian government.

item.title: Manhattan high-rise is still unstable after columns buckle, forcing evacuations
George E. Johnson Sr., founder of a pioneering Black hair care business, dies at 99
